calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. Although the court's docket reflects that a petition for coordination of this action was filed by nonparty Center for Environmental Health, it has not filed any opposition to the proposed settlement, and the Judicial Council has not issued a stay. The court finds that the proposed settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, as follows: The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
